description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular black head with a flat striking surface and subtle decorative detailing on one side. The head is solid and blocky, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty tasks, possibly similar to a sledgehammer. The handle is long, slightly curved, and appears to be made of polished dark wood with a glossy finish, accented by metallic gold bands near the head and at the base. The handle tapers gently towards the end, providing an ergonomic grip for controlled swings. The overall construction looks sturdy and well-balanced, suitable for demanding urban or construction environments. No visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments are present.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a solid black rectangular head and a polished, slightly curved wooden handle with gold accents. The design is robust and suitable for demanding tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from above, highlighting the decorative detailing and flat striking face on the head, as well as the gold accent where the handle meets the head.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the length and curvature of the handle, as well as the blocky, solid nature of the hammer head.
description_view_2: A top-down view of the hammer head, showing its rectangular shape and flat striking surface, with minimal detail visible on the handle.
description_view_3: A side profile of the hammer, clearly displaying the full length of the handle, the gold accents, and the rectangular head's proportions.
attribute_handle_type: Polished wooden handle, slightly curved for ergonomic grip, with a glossy finish and gold metallic accents at both ends.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head, solid black with flat striking faces and subtle decorative detailing on one side.
